extortion.description: [AI generated] MAE.LOCAL is a rising e-commerce platform that focuses on promoting and selling products from local, artisanal, and small businesses. Their mission is to support and promote local entrepreneurs by providing them with a platform where they can showcase their products. Items range from handmade crafts, home decor, jewelry, beauty items, to gourmet food. By shopping at MAE.LOCAL, customers can indirectly help small businesses grow and flourish.
